key_insights.insight: Having people believe in you at a young age is crucial for realizing potential, especially for those lacking strong family support.
key_insights.quote: Having people believe in you at a young age is really important.

key_insights.insight: Skills learned from acting, such as confidence and teamwork, are valuable in business.
key_insights.quote: I actually think the skills of acting is something that all kids benefit from because it gives you confidence.

key_insights.insight: It is vital to be intentional about personal life and set clear goals as you would for your career.
key_insights.quote: Being as intentional on the personal side as on the work side, these things aren't mutually exclusive.

key_insights.insight: When taking on a new leadership role, thoroughly research the business and understand its challenges by having many conversations with insiders and create a list of pros and cons.
key_insights.quote: But then I'm very into also understanding it better by having lots of cups of coffee with people that are in and around the business.

key_insights.insight: Secondary worrying, or catastrophizing, gives power away and should be avoided by focusing on the present and what one can control.
key_insights.quote: Well, I'm going to have chemo, it's not going to work. I'm going to die. John's going to marry a wicked woman. Children are going to be miserable. Boom, I'm exhausted. And it's miserable and depressing. And that's just giving the power away.

key_insights.insight: Meta creates a safe environment for experimentation and learning by debriefing operations, good and bad, directly after.
key_insights.quote: But the key thing is, is to make sure that we're taking the learnings from those failures and then applying it and telling thestories of those things as well.

key_insights.insight: Building diversity, equity, and inclusive design into product development from the beginning is crucial for representing all users.
key_insights.quote: We're building diversity and equity into all of our products and everything that we do.

key_insights.insight: Small businesses are heavily impacted by personalized advertising, and Meta strives to find a compromise between user privacy and effective advertising.
key_insights.quote: The changes that Apple made in terms of what they allowed to happen really impacted small businesses.

key_insights.insight: To advance in your career you need to truly understand your core strengths and skills and be able to communicate your value.
key_insights.quote: I think it's about understanding what what you enjoy i think it starts there and then whether you're playingwhat you're intrinsically good at in with those areas as well because actually sometimes peopleare good at things but don't enjoy it so ultimately, that will not make you as fulfilled or as happy as you as you can be.

actionable_advice.advice: Practice vision writing to be intentional about life goals.
actionable_advice.how_to: Write as though it's a year from now, detailing achievements in personal, work, and community life, then share with others to increase accountability.

actionable_advice.advice: Create a board of advisors for different perspectives.
actionable_advice.how_to: Informally seek advice from people a few years ahead in their careers or older, especially those who have navigated similar challenges.

actionable_advice.advice: Call out unconscious biases when you see them.
actionable_advice.how_to: Notice the woman who is not speaking and make a point to ask their opinion in a group setting.

actionable_advice.advice: Do your homework and be able to communicate your value before pay raise conversations.
actionable_advice.how_to: Know what your value is and be proud of your accomplishments, know what the KPIs were and communicate to your boss all of these things.

memorable_stories: The Latin teacher who told Nicola her personality would prevent success, contrasting with her father's unwavering support.
The English teacher who nearly crushed Nicola's love for reading and her eventual confrontation as a university graduate.
Receiving the cancer diagnosis and Sheryl Sandberg's immediate and supportive response.
The difficulty of telling her children about her incurable cancer diagnosis, including her youngest son's question about whether she was going to die.
Mark Zuckerberg's high conviction about mobile products at Facebook, refusing meetings until mobile products were brought to him.
contrarian_claims: Taking time off to work four days a week can be one of the best things you can do in your career.
The question, 'How do you balance work and life?' is bad because it is generally only asked of women and it is assumed that they must be bad mothers.
Personalized advertising is not a bad thing because small businesses thrive off of it.
You don't have to accept the next rung of the ladder if you don't want to.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - VP Of Meta: Running A Trillion Dollar Business With An Incurable Illness: Nicola Mendelsohn
